columns.name: dem_sap
columns.label: SAP/NHC
columns.description: SAP code associated with the patient

columns.name: pd_stat
columns.label: Patient progressed?
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient has experienced disease progression

columns.name: pd_date
columns.label: Progression date
columns.description: Records the exact date when disease progression was confirmed

columns.name: pd_num_sites
columns.label: Nº sites first progression
columns.description: Records the total number of distinct anatomical sites (organs/regions) with confirmed disease progression at the first documented progression

columns.name: pd_loc
columns.label: Location first progression
columns.description: Documents all anatomical sites exhibiting confirmed disease progression, using multiple-select checkboxes for comprehensive metastatic pattern characterization

columns.name: pd_location_other
columns.label: Other location first progression
columns.description: Free-text field to document anatomical sites of first progression not covered by standard checkbox options

columns.name: pd_locoregional
columns.label: Locoregional recurrence?
columns.description: Indicates whether the first progression event represents isolated recurrence in the ipsilateral primary site, regional lymph nodes, or adjacent structures (without distant metastases), distinguishing locoregional from systemic metastatic progression across all solid tumors

columns.name: pd_locoregional_site
columns.label: Site locoregional recurrenc
columns.description: Classifies confirmed locoregional recurrence sites across all solid tumors as either "local" (ipsilateral primary tumor bed/scar) or "regional" (adjacent lymph nodes)

columns.name: pd_locoregional_date
columns.label: Locoregional recurrence date
columns.description: Records the exact date of pathological or radiological confirmation of locoregional recurrence

columns.name: pd_distant
columns.label: Distant recurrence?
columns.description: Indicates whether the first progression event represents distant metastatic recurrence (M1 disease)

columns.name: pd_distant_site
columns.label: Site distant recurrence
columns.description: Documents all confirmed anatomical sites of distant metastatic recurrence (M1 disease)

columns.name: pd_distant_site_other
columns.label: Other distant recurrent site
columns.description: Free-text field to document anatomical sites of distant metastatic recurrence (M1 disease) not covered by standard checkbox options

columns.name: pd_distant_date
columns.label: Distant recurrence date
columns.description: Records the exact date of pathological or radiological confirmation of distant metastatic recurrence (M1 disease)

columns.name: pd_ecog
columns.label: ECOG first progression
columns.description: Records the Eastern Cooperative Oncology Group (ECOG) performance status scale value assessed at the time of first disease progression confirmation

columns.name: pd_loc_cumulative
columns.label: Total metastatic sites during cancer period
columns.description: Records the cumulative total number of distinct anatomical sites exhibiting metastatic involvement across the entire disease course for all solid tumors, counting each unique organ/region once regardless of multiple progression events or treatment lines.

columns.name: pd_loc_cumulative_other
columns.label: Other metastatic site during cancer period
columns.description: Free-text field to document anatomical sites of metastatic involvement across all solid tumors not covered by standard checkbox options

columns.name: pd_controlateral_breast
columns.label: Invasive Controlateral Breast Cancer?
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient has developed histologically confirmed invasive carcinoma in the contralateral breast, representing a second primary breast malignancy

columns.name: pd_controlateral_breast_date
columns.label: Invasive Controlateral Breast Cancer date
columns.description: Records the exact date of pathological confirmation of invasive carcinoma in the contralateral breast

columns.name: pd_second_primary
columns.label: Second Primary Invasive Cancer (nonbreast)?
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient has developed any histologically confirmed invasive primary malignancy (excluding contralateral breast cancer)

columns.name: pd_second_primary_date
columns.label: Second Primary Invasive Cancer (nonbreast) date
columns.description: Records the exact date of pathological confirmation of any invasive primary malignancy (excluding contralateral breast cancer)

columns.name: pd_crpc_yesno
columns.label: Resistance to castration?
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient with prostate cancer has developed castration-resistant prostate cancer (CRPC), defined as disease progression (rising PSA, radiographic progression, or clinical worsening) despite castrate testosterone levels (<50 ng/dL or <1.7 nmol/L) maintained by androgen deprivation therapy

columns.name: pd_firstmets_yesno
columns.label: Patient developed metastasis?
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient has developed histologically or radiologically confirmed distant metastatic disease (M1 staging) at any point during their cancer history

columns.name: pd_crpc_date
columns.label: Date of CRPC
columns.description: Records the exact date when castration-resistant prostate cancer (CRPC) was confirmed

columns.name: pd_firstmets_date
columns.label: Date of First Metastasis
columns.description: Records the exact date of pathological or radiological confirmation of the first distant metastatic lesion (M1 disease)
